drep_stats.notes: 68% of delegated voting power chose Abstain DRep. Only ~32% actively delegated to autonomous DReps. Top 10 DReps include two founding entities (EMURGO and Cardano Foundation).

cardano_foundation_governance.notes: CF's total delegation of 360M ADA to 18 community DReps is a major governance concentration vector.

governance_milestones.event: Cardano Constitution ratified at Buenos Aires Constitutional Convention
Plomin Hard Fork — full on-chain governance activated
First treasury withdrawal governance action approved
Q4 2025 committee elections: 293 voters, 5182 ballots, 36 seats filled
CF completes ICC tenure; 100% voting record
CF delegates 220M ADA to 11 Adoption/Operations DReps

constitution.changes: Removed non-binding clauses; eliminated Budget Info Action mechanism; added immutability requirements for proposal documents.
key_governance_roles: Delegated Representatives (DReps) — vote on governance actions on behalf of ADA holders
Constitutional Committee (CC) — checks constitutionality of governance actions
Stake Pool Operators (SPOs) — vote on hard forks and certain protocol changes
constitution.guardrails: Constitution defines parameter bounds, treasury limits (Net Change Limit), and voting thresholds for each governance action type.

treasury.notes: Treasury holds ~1.7B ADA (~4.34 years sustainable at current rates). Net Change Limit governs maximum withdrawal per epoch. 2025 budget proposed ₳263.6M total.

constitutional_committee.notes: Fully community-elected CC replaced interim committee. One member resigned triggering snap election; Cardano Curia elected Dec 15, 2025.

intersect_role_in_governance.description: Intersect serves as the off-chain coordinator and treasury administrator. It does not vote on-chain — DReps do. Intersect facilitates the budget process, manages vendor contracts, and coordinates committee work. It explicitly states it 'does not govern on behalf of the community or act as a gatekeeper.'
functions: Administrates treasury fund disbursements via smart contracts
Coordinates the annual budget process across committees
Manages vendor contracts and milestone enforcement
Facilitates committee elections and governance processes
does_not: Vote on governance actions (DReps vote on-chain)
Govern on behalf of the community
Act as a gatekeeper for proposals

budget_process_concerns.description: The 2025 budget process was widely criticized by the community.
issues: No explicit goals or guidance for what the budget should achieve
Overnight process changes that rendered stakeholder knowledge inaccurate
Seven distinct voting stages creating excessive complexity
39 sub-sections but voters could only approve/reject the entire package
IOG received 49.3% of the total approved budget
budget_process_concerns.intersect_response: Published 'Recalibrating Cardano's Budget Process: We've Heard You' — acknowledged lack of transparency around CDH, excessive complexity, and insufficient community authority. Made changes including direct proposal submissions and strengthened DRep decision authority.

recent_ratified.name: Critical Integrations Budget
recent_ratified.notes: Fastest-ever governance vote. Coalition: IOG, EMURGO, CF, Intersect, Midnight Foundation. Five pillars: stablecoins, custody, analytics, bridges, oracles.

chain_split_incident.cause: Deserialization bug from 2022; malformed delegation transaction with oversized hash
chain_split_incident.impact: Accelerated approval of 70M ADA Critical Integrations Budget
